heading: Technology transfer and transitions assessment
label: 18614 Technology transfer and transitions assessment
text: Not later than 1 year after , and as often as the Secretary determines to be necessary thereafter, the Secretary shall transmit to the appropriate committees of Congress a report that includes recommended changes to the policy of the Department and legislative changes to to improve the ability of the Department to successfully transfer new energy technologies to the private sector.September 28, 2018section 16391 of this title
